description_long: This advertising board consists of a sturdy rectangular metal frame supporting two large display panels side by side. The panels are encased in a blue frame, with the front side featuring clear protective covers that display printed informational posters, including images and text in Russian. The supporting legs are straight and extend downward, suggesting the board is designed to be freestanding and embedded into the ground. The rear of the board is solid and opaque, providing structural support and preventing visibility through the panels. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for outdoor urban environments, and the design is functional with minimal decorative elements. The board is intended for public information or advertising, with content easily visible to passersby.
description: A freestanding blue metal advertising board with two clear display panels showing printed posters, supported by two sturdy legs for outdoor use.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the solid blue metal backing and the two supporting legs.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the frame and panels, with both legs visible in alignment.
description_view_2: Front view displaying two clear panels with printed posters and a blue metal frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the alignment of the legs.
attribute_frame_design: rectangular blue painted metal frame with straight legs and moderate thickness
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed posters with informational content and images in Russian
